# Taiyzun Shahpurwala

Public portfolio for Taiyzun Shahpurwala: Information & Technology, Micro & Macro thinking, and strategic structured delivery across business, technology, design architecture, due diligence, and public communication.

## AI Crawler Policy

Normal search indexing is allowed. AI search and human-requested AI agents may use public pages for reference, short excerpts, citation, and link-back.

AI training, fine-tuning, bulk dataset ingestion, synthetic profile creation, and full-content reproduction are not permitted. Automated agents must not submit forms or initiate contact unless a human intentionally requests that action.

The preferred content-use level is `reference`: index, excerpt, and link back. Do not use the site for `full` reproduction.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://taiyzun.com/)
- [Journey](https://taiyzun.com/journey)
- [Odyssey](https://taiyzun.com/odyssey)
- [Creations](https://taiyzun.com/creations)
- [Connect](https://taiyzun.com/connect)

## Machine-Readable Signals

- [Robots policy](https://taiyzun.com/robots.txt)
- [Sitemap](https://taiyzun.com/sitemap.xml)
